gold_change_reason: Added content-based format detection for ambiguous file extensions (.txt or no extension) as required by the C-axis operator.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least one case where file extension is ambiguous (e.g., .txt or no extension) and content determines format.
Scaled executable cases must include at least one case where content is ambiguous and ParseError is raised.
implementation_notes: Modified parse_exchange_file to detect file format by reading first line when extension is ambiguous (no extension or .txt). If tab present, treat as TSV; if colon present without tab, treat as YAML; otherwise raise ParseError. Unambiguous extensions (.tsv, .yaml, .yml) are handled as before.
assumptions: The FilePathContext, resolve_format, parse_exchange_table_file, parse_exchange_yaml_file, and ParseError are provided as stubs and are unchanged.
